name: GraveyardGambit
short_description: GraveyardGambit is an exciting 3D first-person game where you loot graves as a grave robber, evade guards, and buy upgrades. Experience a dark atmosphere, random events, and various weather scenarios.
detailed_description:
Are you dying or already robbing?

GraveyardGambit is an engaging 3D first-person game where you play as a grave robber in a gloomy cemetery. Your mission: dig up and loot graves without being caught by the guards. Use the looted gold to buy upgrades after each round.



Gameplay
  • Sneak around the cemetery and dig up graves to collect gold.
  • Use the gold to buy upgrades and improve your skills.
  • Avoid the guards – if they see and catch you, you lose the round.
  • After three captures, the game is lost and you have to start over.
  • Win a round by successfully escaping the cemetery with the looted gold.
  • The goal is to complete as many rounds as possible without losing all three lives.



Key Features
  • Immersive Atmosphere: Experience a dark atmosphere with fog, light, and low-poly graphics.
  • Increasing Difficulty: More guards with new abilities appear as the game progresses.
  • Different Weather Scenarios: Four different weather scenarios offer variety and challenges.
  • Random Events: A large grave appears randomly in each round, offering more loot.
  • Perfect Sound: The sound perfectly complements the atmospheric experience.



Dive into the world of GraveyardGambit and test your skills as a clever grave robber. Can you survive all the rounds and collect the most gold without getting caught?

Have fun and happy hunting!

supported_languages:
German*, English*, French, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
